title: SemantAH indexd scaling
goal: Reduce indexd search/write contention and define evidence-based exact-search and ANN boundaries without weakening deterministic ranking, snapshot consistency, persistence or bounded-memory contracts.
completion: Search ranking and snippet materialization execute outside the shared mutable store lock while each request observes one consistent namespace snapshot.
The snapshot path has measured latency, allocation and writer-blocking evidence against the established real-workload benchmark.
Exact search remains the default below a measured threshold and any ANN path has explicit recall, memory, rebuild, persistence and fallback contracts.
Architecture and performance documentation distinguish implemented behavior, measured limits and future plans.

does_not_establish: permission to replace exact search without recall evidence
